# CatchFire Influencer Matching Engine — Public Directory

This directory contains static HTML pages served directly by Express:
- `index.html` — Beta Control Center (primary dashboard with semantic search)
- `dashboard.html` — Analytics dashboard
- `testing.html` — Match testing UI

These are standalone HTML files (not React). The React SPA lives in `web/`.
